overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in red armor walking through Omi Village during golden hour. The character passes through traditional Japanese torii gates, ascends stone stairs, and explores a forested path leading to wooden village buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with large torii gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path toward and through the large torii gate

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence lining the left side of the path
large stone torii gate with wooden lintel marking the village entrance
traditional Japanese stone lantern beside the path
trees with white and pink blossoms framing the entrance

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a cobblestone path flanked by wooden fences toward a large stone torii gate. Cherry blossom trees frame the scene as the character approaches and passes through the gate, with stone lanterns visible along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending into forested area

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs upward between rock walls into the forest

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending the hillside
large natural rock formation bordering the stairs
smaller wooden torii gate at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to stone stairs ascending between a rock wall and forest edge. The character climbs steadily, leaving the initial village entrance behind, approaching a smaller torii gate at the top of the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone bridges and scattered torii gates

events.description: crossing a small stone bridge over a stream

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest path surrounded by tall trees and dappled sunlight

entered.detail: flat stone bridge crossing a small waterway
tall pine and deciduous trees with golden foliage
wooden torii gate standing among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a dense forest, crossing a stone bridge. Tall trees with golden foliage surround the path, and wooden torii gates appear periodically among the trees as the environment opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional village with wooden buildings and narrow paths

events.description: entering the built-up village area with traditional wooden structures
lighting shifts to deeper golden hour with warm red tones as sun lowers

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow village paths between traditional wooden buildings and fences

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden buildings with tiled roofs and paper windows
dark wooden fence lining the right side of the narrow path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a traditional village with wooden buildings lining narrow dirt paths. The lighting shifts to deep golden hour tones with warm red hues as the samurai explores between the structures, passing stone lanterns and wooden fences.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a ceremonial village entrance through a forested ascent and into a traditional residential settlement during the golden hour. It begins with the samurai walking along a cobblestone path framed by cherry blossoms and stone lanterns, passing through a large stone torii gate. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character up a set of stone stairs ascending between a rock wall and the forest edge toward a smaller gate. The scene then opens into a dense forest of golden foliage, where the path becomes a dirt trail that crosses a stone bridge and winds past periodic torii gates. Finally, the environment transitions into the heart of the village, where the lighting deepens into warm red hues as the samurai explores narrow paths lined with wooden buildings and fences.
